description_long: This coffee machine features a bold, black exterior adorned with striking graphics, including a large blue police badge emblem and red warning text. The front displays a row of buttons or levers, a digital display, and a prominent 'DANGER' sign above the open drawer, which contains a purple object. On the left side, a white Starbucks cup is attached, and both sides are decorated with large, star-shaped designs in red and blue. The top of the machine has two red circular lights and a vented section, while the back is mostly plain with a 'STAND CLEAR' warning in red. The machine has two protruding handles on either side, suggesting manual operation, and the overall design is robust and industrial.
description: A black, industrial coffee machine with police-themed graphics, red warning labels, and a Starbucks cup attached to the side. It features prominent buttons, levers, and decorative star motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the police badge emblem, button row, digital display, 'DANGER' sign, open drawer with a purple object, and attached Starbucks cup.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large red and blue star design, side handle, and vented blue panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black surface with a red 'STAND CLEAR' warning and both side handles visible.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring another large star design, the Starbucks cup attachment, and the side handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A Starbucks logo is visible on the white cup attached to the left side; a large blue police badge emblem is present on the front.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of buttons or levers is positioned on the front, below the police badge emblem, with a digital display and warning labels above and below.
